entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A cultivated legume also known as peanut, scientifically named Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A plant family to which groundnut belongs, described as unpredictable in the past.

entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: The genus containing 81 described species, including groundnut.

entities.name: DIPLOIDS
entities.description: Organisms with two sets of chromosomes found within the genus Arachis.

entities.name: TETRAPLOIDS
entities.description: Organisms with four sets of chromosomes found within the genus Arachis.

entities.name: ANNUAL
entities.description: A life cycle type where the plant completes its life cycle in one year.

entities.name: PERENNIAL
entities.description: A life cycle type where the plant lives for more than two years.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the form and structure of organisms, used for classification of Arachis.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The spatial arrangement of species, used for classification of Arachis.

entities.name: CROSS-COMPATIBILITY
entities.description: The ability of different species to interbreed, used for classification of Arachis.

entities.name: HYPOGAEA
entities.description: A sub-species of the cultivated groundnut Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: FASTIGATA
entities.description: A sub-species of the cultivated groundnut Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: BRANCHING PATTERN
entities.description: A morphological characteristic used to divide groundnut into sub-species.

entities.name: DISTRIBUTION OF VEGETATIVE AND REPRODUCTIVE AXES
entities.description: A morphological characteristic used to divide groundnut into sub-species.

relationships.target: DISTRIBUTION OF VEGETATIVE AND REPRODUCTIVE AXES
